name: Hostinger

name: Linode (Akamai)
description: Developer-friendly VPS platform now part of Akamai with simple pricing and great docs.

name: Vultr
description: High-performance cloud compute and bare metal servers across 30+ global locations.

name: Hetzner
description: European leader in affordable VPS and dedicated servers with excellent price-to-performance.

name: Contabo
description: Budget VPS provider offering generous resources at low prices.

name: Kamatera
description: Flexible cloud VPS with 13 global data centers and per-minute billing.

name: Railway

name: Render
description: Unified cloud platform for web services, static sites, cron jobs, and managed databases.

name: Fly.io
description: Run full-stack apps and databases close to users at the edge with container-based deploys.

name: Vercel

name: Netlify

name: Heroku

name: Dokku

name: WP Engine
description: Premium managed WordPress hosting with enterprise-grade performance and security.

name: Kinsta

name: Pressable

name: SiteGround
description: Popular shared and managed WordPress hosting with excellent support and speed tools.

name: Cloudways
description: Managed cloud hosting platform with DigitalOcean, AWS, and GCP backends.

name: Bluehost
description: Beginner-friendly shared hosting recommended by WordPress.org with easy setup.

name: DreamHost
description: Developer-oriented shared and VPS hosting with generous storage and bandwidth.

description: Speed-optimized shared hosting with Turbo servers and developer-friendly features.

name: Namecheap Hosting
description: Affordable shared and VPS hosting from one of the largest domain registrars.

name: GreenGeeks
description: Eco-friendly web hosting that matches 3x the energy it consumes with renewable credits.

name: Cloudflare Workers
description: Serverless edge compute platform running at 300+ locations worldwide with V8 isolates.

name: Deno Deploy

name: AWS Lambda

name: Fastly Compute
